findingsNew.title: /design:foundations metadata omits the packet's required procedure-card surface
findingsNew.claim: The /design:foundations command metadata does not correctly reflect the packet's own procedures/ contract.
findingsNew.counterevidenceSought: Checked the /design:foundations command metadata choreography, taskProjections, proofFields, and outputContract for a procedures/ resource or action; only references/, assets, task projection sources, and proof fields were present.
findingsNew.alternativeExplanation: The parent hub may load SKILL.md and manual execution may still follow procedure-card selection, so this is a metadata contract gap rather than proof that runtime behavior always fails.
findingsNew.downgradeTrigger: Downgrade to P2 if command-metadata.json choreography is confirmed to be non-operative catalog text and not consumed by any command routing or docs generator.

findingsNew.title: package_skill.py --check warns that SKILL.md exceeds the recommended size budget
evidenceRefs: package_skill.py --check output: SKILL.md has 3163 words (recommended max: 3000)

findingsNew.title: Two script-backed validators are not discoverable from SKILL.md or the packet procedures

traceabilityChecks.packetSkillName: pass: mode-registry packetSkillName design-foundations matches SKILL.md name
traceabilityChecks.proceduresPath: pass: mode-registry proceduresPath design-foundations/procedures exists with three procedure cards
traceabilityChecks.toolSurface: pass_coarse: registry Read/Glob/Grep no mutation matches SKILL allowed-tools; prior contrast-script parity concern not re-counted
traceabilityChecks.excludedAliases: pass: typeset/colorize excluded from free-text transform aliasing while explicit command task projections own those verbs under /design:foundations
traceabilityChecks.commandMetadataProcedures: fail: /design:foundations choreography omits design-foundations/procedures despite packet procedure-card routing contract
traceabilityChecks.orphanScan: partial: baseline_rhythm_check.py and naming_doc_check.py are not surfaced from SKILL.md or mode procedures

title: /design:foundations metadata omits the packet's required procedure-card surface
claim: The /design:foundations command metadata does not correctly reflect the packet's own procedures/ contract.
counterevidenceSought: Checked choreography, taskProjections, proofFields, and outputContract; no procedures/ resource or action appears in the foundations command metadata entry.
alternativeExplanation: Manual hub loading of SKILL.md may still expose procedure cards, limiting this to metadata traceability unless command choreography is executable.
downgradeTrigger: Downgrade if command metadata is confirmed non-operative catalog text only.
